title: physostemon lanceolatus subsp. oaxacensis
intro: Physostemon lanceolatus subsp. oaxacensis, also known as Mexican physostemon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mexican physostemon include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Mexican physostemon can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
